idea-plugin.name: Viritin Color
idea-plugin.description:
Color swatches and a color picker for the Viritin Color Java library (in.virit:color).
  • Shows a color swatch in the editor gutter next to RgbColor, HexColor, HslColor and NamedColor expressions.
  • Click the swatch to open the standard IDE color picker and rewrite the source to the chosen color.
  • Offers named-color completion (with swatches) wherever a Color is expected.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.2.0

  • Color swatches now appear next to each entry in the NamedColor. autocompletion popup (decorating the IDE's native enum completion).
  • Editing a NamedColor.X reference via the picker writes new RgbColor(...) instead of HexColor.of("#..."), and consecutive drags in the picker now apply correctly instead of stalling after the first commit.
  • Picking a transparent color on a 3-arg new RgbColor(r, g, b) or new HslColor(h, s, l) now upgrades the expression to the 4-arg constructor so alpha actually lands in the source.

0.1.2 — first public release

  • Editor gutter swatches for RgbColor, HexColor, HslColor, Color.parseCssColor and NamedColor.X.
  • Click the swatch to open the IDE color picker; the source is rewritten in the original shape.
  • Named-color completion with swatch icons in Color contexts.
